nodes.summary: 帝汶绿鸠（Treron psittaceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Timor green pigeon。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: Timor green pigeon
nodes.summary: The Timor green pigeon (Treron psittaceus) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found on the islands of Rote and Timor. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. Distribution and habitat The Timor green pigeon is found on the islands of Rote, Timor, Semau, and Atauro in the Lesser Sunda Islands. It inhabits primary forest, monsoon forest, and secondary forest with tall trees in lowlands, occurring up to altitudes of 160 m (520 ft). Behaviour and ecology The Timor green pigeon is frugivorous and has been recorded feeding on figs. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The Timor green pigeon (Treron psittaceus) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is found on the islands of Rote and Timor.
